name: Computer Forensics
description: Digital forensics analysis and investigation techniques

findings_summary.notes: CRITICAL: The repo_url path (computer-forensics-skills/skills/computer-forensics) does not exist in the mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace repository. The repository has no computer-forensics-skills directory. The full repo tree was inspected recursively and only contains: engineering-workflow-plugin, visual-documentation-plugin, productivity-skills-plugin, code-operations-plugin, and execution-runtime. CHANGELOG confirms only engineering-workflow (v1.0.0) and feature-planning/plan-implementer (v1.1.0) as releases. Both computer-forensics and file-deletion skills appear to have been incorrectly catalogued against this repo with fabricated subdirectory paths. Actual star count for parent repo is 406 (not 350 as recorded). These skills cannot be verified and should be re-sourced or removed.

scan_summary: SOURCE PATH DOES NOT EXIST. computer-forensics-skills/ directory never existed in mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace. Shares the same fabricated path issue as file-deletion-647d2547. Skill cannot be verified.
